en: Now concerning the times and the seasons, brothers, you have no need to have anything written to you.
zh: 弟兄們，論到時候和日期，不用寫甚麼給你們了。

en: For you yourselves are fully aware that the day of the Lord will come like a thief in the night.
zh: 因為你們自己清楚知道，主的日子來到，就像夜間的賊來到一樣。

en: While people are saying, "There is peace and security," then sudden destruction will come upon them as labor pains come upon a pregnant woman, and they will not escape.
zh: 人正在說平安穩妥的時候，毀滅性的災禍就突然臨到他們，好像生產的痛苦臨到懷胎的婦人一樣，他們絕不能逃脫。

en: But you are not in darkness, brothers, for that day to surprise you like a thief.
zh: 但是弟兄們，你們不在黑暗裡，以致那日子會臨到你們像賊來到一樣。

en: For you are all children of light, children of the day. We are not of the night or of the darkness.
zh: 你們都是光明之子、白晝之子；我們不是屬於黑夜的，也不是屬於黑暗的。

en: So then let us not sleep, as others do, but let us keep awake and be sober.
zh: 所以，我們不要沉睡像別人一樣，總要警醒謹慎。

en: For those who sleep, sleep at night, and those who get drunk, are drunk at night.
zh: 因為睡覺的人是在晚上睡，醉酒的人是在晚上醉；

en: But since we belong to the day, let us be sober, having put on the breastplate of faith and love, and for a helmet the hope of salvation.
zh: 但我們既然屬於白晝，就應當謹慎，披上信和愛的胸甲，戴上救恩的盼望作頭盔。

en: For God has not destined us for wrath, but to obtain salvation through our Lord Jesus Christ,
zh: 因為 神不是定意要我們受刑罰 ，而是要我們藉著我們的主耶穌基督得著救恩。

en: who died for us so that whether we are awake or asleep we might live with him.
zh: 基督替我們死，使我們無論是醒著或睡著，都和他一同活著。

en: Therefore encourage one another and build one another up, just as you are doing.
zh: 所以，你們應該彼此勸慰，互相造就，正如你們一向所行的。

en: We ask you, brothers, to respect those who labor among you and are over you in the Lord and admonish you,
zh: 弟兄們，我們求你們要敬重那些在你們中間勞苦的人，就是在主裡面治理你們、勸戒你們的人。

en: and to esteem them very highly in love because of their work. Be at peace among yourselves.
zh: 又因為他們的工作，你們要用愛心格外尊重他們。你們應當彼此和睦。

en: And we urge you, brothers, admonish the idle, encourage the fainthearted, help the weak, be patient with them all.
zh: 弟兄們，我們勸你們，要警戒游手好閒的人，勉勵灰心喪志的人，扶助軟弱無力的人，也要容忍所有的人。

en: See that no one repays anyone evil for evil, but always seek to do good to one another and to everyone.
zh: 你們要注意，不管是誰都不要以惡報惡，卻要在彼此相處和對待眾人這方面，常常追求良善。

en: Rejoice always,
zh: 要常常喜樂，

en: pray without ceasing,
zh: 不住禱告，

en: give thanks in all circumstances; for this is the will of God in Christ Jesus for you.
zh: 凡事謝恩；這就是 神在基督耶穌裡給你們的旨意。

en: Do not quench the Spirit.
zh: 不要熄滅聖靈的感動。

en: Do not despise prophecies,
zh: 不要藐視先知的話語。

en: but test everything; hold fast what is good.
zh: 凡事都要察驗，好的要持守，

en: Abstain from every form of evil.
zh: 各樣的惡事要遠離。

en: Now may the God of peace himself sanctify you completely, and may your whole spirit and soul and body be kept blameless at the coming of our Lord Jesus Christ.
zh: 願賜平安的 神親自使你們完全成聖，又願你們整個人：靈、魂和身體都得蒙保守，在我們的主耶穌基督再來的時候，無可指摘。

en: He who calls you is faithful; he will surely do it.
zh: 那呼召你們的是信實的，他必成就這事。

en: Brothers, pray for us.
zh: 弟兄們，請為我們禱告。

en: Greet all the brothers with a holy kiss.
zh: 要用聖潔的親吻問候眾弟兄。

en: I put you under oath before the Lord to have this letter read to all the brothers.
zh: 我憑著主吩咐你們，要把這封信讀給眾弟兄聽。

en: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you.
zh: 願我們主耶穌基督的恩惠與你們同在。
